landing.banner: Connect to the Future: Driving Innovation in Web3

features.title: Main Features
features.rewardsContent: Students who complete learning trails receive blockchain certification, ensuring authentic and verifiable recognition of the knowledge acquired.
features.learningTrailsContent: Our learning trails guide students from basic to advanced in a practical and interactive way, with well-structured modules and tests to reinforce knowledge.
features.soonContent: We offer a forum for our users to share experiences and stories about blockchain

explore.title: Explore the Platform
explore.description: Check out our main features available on our site. Learn the key concepts of the Web3 world!

trails.title: Learning Trails
trails.description: Explore detailed content on these fascinating topics and expand your knowledge of the digital world of finance and technology. Welcome to your learning journey with us!

welcome.title: Welcome to Web3EduBrasil!
welcome.subtitle: Before we begin, let's understand the features of the Web3EduBrasil platform

communities.title: Join our communities
communities.text: Join our Web3 communities and stay up to date! Follow us on social media, share experiences and learn together with us.

homeScreen.title: Home Screen
homeScreen.text: On this screen you will find some profile data, a preview of your earned NFTs, the user journey and your last three learning trails.
homeScreen.access: Access via the navigation bar at the top of the screen

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.text: Here you can customize your profile, adding your Discord or LinkedIn. Don't forget to update your name, as it will appear on your certificate!
profile.access: Access (Profile) in the top right corner of your screen

userConfig.title: Configure user profile
userConfig.text: Complete our brief form so we can recommend learning trails of your interest.
userConfig.access: Access on the home screen in User Journey

trailsScreen.title: Trails Screen
trailsScreen.text: On this screen you will find all learning trails, being able to search them by name or category and access them.
trailsScreen.access: Access via the navigation bar at the top of the screen

learning.title: Learning Trail
learning.text: Learn about Web3 by accessing and completing the tasks in our trails!
learning.access: Access via the trails screen or through the quick access on the home screen

reward.title: Claim your reward!
reward.text: Upon completing a learning trail, claim your NFT by clicking Claim Now
reward.access: Available when marking the last task of a trail as complete.

done.title: All set!
done.text: Great! You are ready to start exploring our platform and collecting NFTs
done.access: Click on Access Platform to start your journey!
done.help: If you need to revisit any step or have questions, access this tutorial in the Help tab in the user menu.
done.instruction: Access your NFT by clicking on your wallet

wallet.step1Text: Our platform has a unique integrated Web3 wallet for each user, allowing you to explore and interact with Web3 in just a few clicks.
wallet.step1Instruction: Open the wallet located in the top right corner
wallet.step2Text: This is your wallet! With it, you can receive NFTs as rewards for completing learning trails. Let's set it up together.
wallet.step4Text: These settings are essential for you to receive NFT rewards upon completing our learning trails.
wallet.step4Instruction: Enable 'Test Networks' and then select 'Ethereum Sepolia' as your default network.
wallet.step5Text: Great! Now that the settings are complete, you're ready to create your account and start exploring our learning trails. Let's go!
wallet.step5Instruction: Your wallet should look like this:
wallet.availableHelp: This tutorial will always be available in the Help tab, in case you need to revisit any step or have questions.

userPage.title: Data
userPage.noCertificatesText: Complete a trail or program to receive your unique NFT certificate.

reward.bodyText: All your effort and dedication did not go unnoticed. To celebrate this achievement, you will receive an NFT token as a reward! This token symbolizes everything you have learned and your commitment at every step.
reward.connectWarning: ⚠️ Connect a wallet to claim your NFT.
